name: roomio-texturing
description: Agent H — Roomio photo texture mapping: take a user's furniture photo, detect+crop its surface (reusing Agent B's detection), turn the crop into a seamless, de-lit tiling PBR material (albedo + roughness + normal), and apply it to the matching archetype's material slot with world-space tiling + user scale/rotation. UV guarantee: corpus is parametric R3F primitives (auto-UV'd) + triplanar safety net. Suggestion-with-confirm (preview/accept/revert). Drop-in R3F lib + standalone demo harness; no edits to A/B/C/E/G source.
